name: VTIL_ActivateWorkingSet
title: VTIL_ActivateWorkingSet
syntax: long VTIL_ActivateWorkingSet(dbNode vt, dbNode workingSetMaster); // form 3
long VTIL_ActivateWorkingSet(dbNode vt, byte workingSetMasterAddress); // form 4
description: Activates a corresponding Working Set in the Virtual Terminal: As a result, the VT Status message is sent with the source address of newly activated Working Set as well as its active Data/Alarm and Soft Key Mask.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: workingSetMasterAddress
parameters.description: Address of the Working Set Master

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
